title: Possible API Key Exposure After Friday Deploy

notes: This packet is synthetic lab evidence using real-world log shapes.
IP addresses use documentation ranges and should not be treated as real attribution.
Token-like values are redacted labels only and are not usable credentials.

evidence.description: Customer Records API gateway request logs around the suspicious spike.
Service-token auth events and anomaly signals.
Friday deploy diff that introduced a fallback token path.
Secret scanner output from the release branch.
Indicator notes for source IPs seen in the spike.
Human-approval and customer-notification policy used by Risk & Compliance.
